title: U.S. and Israel Striking Iran Security Agencies That Helped Crush Protests
author: Erika Solomon and Sanjana Varghese
fullText: Their attacks have targeted police stations and intelligence bases in what may be part of a plan to encourage Iranians to rise up against the government, experts say.
summary: Their attacks have targeted police stations and intelligence bases in what may be part of a plan to encourage Iranians to rise up against the government, experts say.
